payload.title: September 2024 Overtime report slides
payload.description: MTA overtime budget performance report for YTD September 2024 covering non-reimbursable and reimbursable overtime across all agencies

payload.raw_value_text: YTD September overspend of $194M, 31% vs 2024 Mid-Year Forecast

tool_args.label: YTD September Non-Reimbursable Overtime vs YTD 2019

payload.raw_value_text: YTD September overtime was 14% higher vs. YTD 2019

payload.raw_value_text: September overspend of $19M, 27% vs. 2024 Mid-Year Forecast
MTA Bus: $69M spent YTD and $5M favorable

payload.raw_value_text: MTA HQ: $26M spent YTD and $3M unfavorable

September overspend of $6M, 31% vs. 2024 Mid-Year Forecast

payload.claim_text: NYCT non-reimbursable overtime $193M unfavorable primarily due to higher vacancy/absentee coverage and weather-related requirements
payload.subject: NYCT

payload.claim_text: MTA Bus non-reimbursable overtime $5M favorable mainly due to lower scheduled and unscheduled service, and lower programmatic maintenance requirements
payload.subject: MTA Bus

payload.claim_text: B&T non-reimbursable overtime $2M favorable reflecting management efficiencies and improved scheduling and deployment practices
payload.subject: B&T

payload.claim_text: MTA HQ non-reimbursable overtime $3M unfavorable due to re-alignment between reimbursable and non-reimbursable overtime, and higher safety/security enforcement requirements
payload.subject: MTA HQ

payload.claim_text: LIRR non-reimbursable overtime $2M unfavorable mainly due to higher programmatic/routine maintenance, vacancy/absentee coverage, weather-related requirements, unscheduled service, and unscheduled maintenance requirements
payload.subject: LIRR

payload.claim_text: MNR non-reimbursable overtime $4M unfavorable mainly reflecting higher programmatic maintenance
payload.subject: MNR

payload.claim_text: SIR non-reimbursable overtime $0.1M favorable mainly due to the timing of reimbursable charges
payload.subject: SIR

payload.claim_text: NYCT reimbursable overtime $33M unfavorable primarily due to vacancy/absentee coverage and service requirements
payload.subject: NYCT

payload.claim_text: LIRR reimbursable overtime $8M unfavorable mainly due to the capital projects and Transportation flagging
payload.subject: LIRR

payload.claim_text: MNR reimbursable overtime $2M favorable mainly due to lower Transportation flagging costs
payload.subject: MNR
